name: Monkey Wave
short_description: Monkey Wave is a fast-paced action clicker where you defend your banana stash against waves of hostile apes. Click rapidly to defeat primates and epic bosses in solo, co-op, and PvP modes. Deploy strategic abilities and survive the chaos of the jungle.

name: BreakDespair2D
short_description: Enjoy mining, upgrades, and explosive growth in this all-directional scrolling shooter. Auto-upgrades allow idle play, with no time limits or game overs. Defaults work fine, story scenes can be skipped, 20 weapons unlock later, and levels can reach 900 million.

name: FISH KISSER
short_description: FISH KISSER is a roguelike where you explore the bottom of the ocean, fulfilling your greatest fantasy: catching and kissing fish! Buy cards, earn points, and mildly disturb everyone on the island.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Fading Echo
short_description: Fading Echo is a fast-paced elemental action-adventure RPG where creativity fuels combat. Manipulate water, trigger chain reactions, and shift through surreal worlds as One, a young Legend on a mission to save a dying desertscape from the grip of the Paradox corruption.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10
現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Deserted Island Where Desire Blossoms
short_description: Deserted Island Survival: 1 Man, 3 Women—Erotic Entanglements Amidst Scarcity; A Taboo Magical Adventure of Passionate Escape.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: A Game About Getting Bigger
short_description: A Game About Getting Bigger is a loot-driven incremental game about feeding a growing black hole. Destroy celestial bodies to make the black hole at the center grow larger and larger.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Loot +18
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Ofuda Placement Service
short_description: Ofuda Placement Service is a first-person horror game set in a school late at night, where you place Ofuda while being pursued by a spirit’s footprints and complete the request.

name: Toxic Marriage Punisher
short_description: "Toxic Marriage Punisher" Curing marriage pests! Investigate. Infiltrate. Snap. Spy. Steal. Outwit. What is your spouse doing behind your back? Your evidence, the deadliest sanction. Now, become the shadow of justice, and unveil every betrayal and infidelity!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: Deep Sea Idle: Infinity Abyss
short_description: Dive into an endless deep-sea idle adventure. Combine torpedoes, split shots, lightning, explosions, plasma, and beams to trigger screen-clearing chain reactions. Collect resources, grow your Aquarium, upgrade your submarine and weapons, defeat bosses, and descend deeper into the abyss.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: FragMiner
short_description: Mine deep with bombs, shatter rare ores, and trigger satisfying chain reactions. Clear entire mine layers with powerful explosives in this incremental game where pickaxes are strictly forbidden.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: The King Got Too Much Gold
short_description: Your royal fountain spits out more gold than anyone could ever spend, and cleaning it up is somehow your job. Sweep coins, sell them, draft upgrades, hire goblins, trolls and a cat, unlock a big web of skills, then feed your whole fortune to the Glutton King. You can never lose. The gold never stops
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Millennium Conflict
short_description: You are the last survivor. Capture towers, command a squad of unique generals, and battle through 40 missions across 10 distinct worlds as you fight to reclaim a universe that has fallen to the enemy.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Infinite Minesweeper Simulator
short_description: Infinite Minesweeper Simulator offers unlimited huge maps based on classic Minesweeper. Great for stress relief and casual breaks. No time limits, perfect for perfectionists, new players and veteran fans to play freely anytime.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Season 4 Advanced Pack - Battlefield™ 6 and REDSEC
short_description: Get 1,100 Battlefield Coins (enough to purchase the Battle Pass) and 6 exclusive items to help you dominate every domain. Get the Season 4 Advanced Pack, featuring a NATO Soldier Skin, Weapon Package, and more.

name: Hentai Clicker: Kaia is streaming
short_description: Click, collect hearts, buy upgrades, and unlock scenes, outfits, and voice reactions with Kaia, a naughty volleyball player, in Hentai clicker: Kaia is streaming.

name: Season 4 Battlefield Pro - Battlefield™ 6 and REDSEC
short_description: Turn the tide of war with Battlefield Pro: the ultimate Battle Pass offer. Unlock premium rewards, the full Season 4 Battle Pass, 25 Tier Skips, a +5% XP Booster, access to an exclusive Bonus Path, and more.

name: Season 4 Battlefield Pro - Battlefield™ 6 and REDSEC
short_description: Turn the tide of war with Battlefield Pro: the ultimate Battle Pass offer. Unlock premium rewards, the full Season 4 Battle Pass, 25 Tier Skips, a +5% XP Booster, access to an exclusive Bonus Path, and more.

name: Scoundrel: Deck Crawler
short_description: A roguelike pixel-art dungeon crawler inspired by the card game Scoundrel. Strategically manage your health and equipment while using Tarot cards to survive until the very last card.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10

name: Cobalt Miner
short_description: Survive in futuristic 2046 USA where a ruthless megacorporation owns your debt. Mine cobalt, automate production, craft machines, explore a dying world, and ride your electric bike across vast pixel-art wastelands. Pay what you owe… or disappear.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Firefighting Simulator: Ignite - Motor Vehicle Accident Expansion
short_description: Accept the call and handle motor vehicle accidents with the Motor Vehicle Accident Expansion for Firefighting Simulator: Ignite – adding new missions, new gameplay mechanics, new tools, and more.

name: Chippy Beaver
short_description: Chippy Beaver​ is an engaging incremental idle game where you lead your beaver colony to chop down fantastical trees in the sky, harvest various relics, construct diverse buildings, and use money to upgrade your beavers.

name: English Vocab Rush
short_description: A combo-driven deckbuilder inspired by poker-style hand building. Build powerful decks, unleash explosive combos, and challenge unique opponents. Discover diverse hands, equipment, and hidden mechanics while chasing huge scores.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Orbital Tower Defence
short_description: Build towers on rotating orbital rings to defend your planet. Discover powerful upgrades, battle elite enemies and bosses, and master unique planets with distinct challenges.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Kujira no Hara
short_description: A funny puzzle-focused Zelda-like about Vikings trapped in a whale! It's 50 hours long and has 7 dungeons.

name: Delicious - Taste of Truth
short_description: The O'Malleys are back in a new adventure packed with food, family, and secrets!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Max Savage
short_description: Retro arcade space combat meets action-adventure exploration. Blast through a 90s-inspired sci-fi romp as Max Savage and fight to save the one person she can’t lose.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Season 4 Starter Pack - Battlefield™ 6 and REDSEC
short_description: Get 500 Battlefield Coins and 4 exclusive items that will amplify your arsenal. Get the Season 4 Starter Pack and unlock a Weapon Package, Weapon Charm, and more.

name: Tsunami Clash Pack - Battlefield™ 6 and REDSEC
short_description: Surge above the enemy, then run them aground on the battlefield with the Tsunami Clash Pack. Featuring a Pax Armata Soldier Skin, 2 Weapon Packages, a Vehicle Skin, and more.

name: Cheminots
short_description: Cheminots is a train conducting simulator, together you need to make sure the passengers reach their destination. Manage your coal and your water. Keep your locomotive intact. Control your passengers and keep their satisfaction high.

name: Dragons and Nature
short_description: Dragon & Nature is a guofeng automation strategy game about rebuilding an ecological conveyor loop. Balance five-element materials, unlock seasonal production chains, and awaken the Dragon Core to synthesize the ultimate resource: Dao.
